title: What It Actually Looks Like to Be Hard on Yourself, Soft With Everyone Else
caption:
Hard on your sin. Gentle with his. Most men have that flipped.

He's ruthless with his own excuses. No grace for the version of him that skips the workout, skips the Word, skips the hard conversation. But put the same sin in a brother's hands and suddenly he remembers what grace is for.

Self-contempt never made anyone holy. Self-honesty plus grace for the guy across the table does.

#faith #character #brotherhood #christianman #manofgod
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
